headline: Dashboard live with ICARUS method named and tracked; Sharpe corrected to 1.25; three hypotheses below floor, one structurally refuted.
what_happened: ICARUS (HYP-093: fade-sell at 10:30) shipped live with p=.031, DSR .987, but constitutional yield +0.00023%/day falls short of 0.0005 floor—valid signal, insufficient edge.
Sharpe refreshed to 1.25 (from stale 1.08) across all six dashboard spots; ICARUS shadow calendar now merges into main Calendar tab with weekly/monthly totals at $100k basis.
HYP-097 (W* collar, sub-$3 tier) structurally refuted: empirical T10/T20 overshoot dominated by LULD floor; constitutional yield collapsed to 0.0166%/day vs 0.023% assumed.
HYP-094 and HYP-095 both NOT_SIGNIFICANT; HYP-091 out-of-sample. Oracle daily brief automation live (read-only, cost-capped)—1/30 shadow days logged.
what_it_means: You have a named, audited method (ICARUS) with honest edge, but it's 4–5x below the floor you need. The three dead hypotheses (HYP-093, 094, 095, 097) confirm the yield frontier is narrower than your 30-day-to-funded timeline assumes—you're validating, not enriching. The dashboard now truthfully tracks shadow P&L; use it to hunt the gap between 0.0005 and real edge.
todays_one_thing: Measure variance premium in gapper chains (the honest path HYP-097 opened): if real, it compounds ICARUS; if not, you've closed the last structural escape route and must pivot to distribution-based sizing (RCK, W6) or catalyst edge concentration (TICK-034).
